name: specdrive
description: Frontend spec-driven development: requirements, gap-analysis, design, and tasks for Flutter, Next.js, and React Native.
long_description: SpecDrive brings Kiro-style spec-driven development to frontend projects. The MCP server scans your repo and returns generation bundles — Claude writes requirements.md, gap-analysis.md, design.md, and tasks.md using your API. Workflow: create_spec → write_spec_document → approve gates → implement. Requires `spec init` in the project first.

tools.name: create_spec
tools.description: Scaffold a new feature spec and return requirements generation bundle

tools.name: write_spec_document
tools.description: Save generated markdown to the spec folder

tools.name: scan_codebase
tools.description: Scan repo for relevant source context

tools.name: get_next_task
tools.description: Get implementation context for next pending task

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task as done in tasks.md

tools.name: search_specs
tools.description: List all specs in the project

tools.name: get_spec_status
tools.description: Get spec phase, gates, and task progress
